name: atlas-marketing-studio
description: Atlas Marketing Studio is an open-source AI e-commerce ad studio for generating UGC product ads, reference-ad remakes, AI drama ads, and ad skits with Atlas Cloud multi-model workflows.

scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run platform:prepare && next build
scripts.postinstall: npm run prisma:generate && npm run platform:prepare
scripts.db:push:vercel: npm run prisma:generate && prisma db push --schema prisma/.generated/schema.neon.prisma
scripts.cf:prepare: DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare npm run prisma:generate && DEPLOY_TARGET=cloudflare npm run platform:prepare
scripts.cf:preview: npm run cf:prepare && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:prepare && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
